testcase.name: test_01_status_shape_and_fresh_state
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_onboarding.py:139: in test_01_status_shape_and_fresh_state assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Password change required. Please change your password before continuing."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_auto_dismiss_at_100
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_onboarding.py:274: in test_09_auto_dismiss_at_100 steps = _steps_dict(st) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_onboarding.py:120: in _steps_dict return {s["key"]: s["done"] for s in status["steps"]} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'steps'

testcase.name: test_10_explicit_dismiss_idempotent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_onboarding.py:288: in test_10_explicit_dismiss_idempotent assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Password change required. Please change your password before continuing."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_force_password_change_gate
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_onboarding.py:306: in test_11_force_password_change_gate assert gr.status_code == 403, gr.text E AssertionError: {"dismissed":false,"steps":[{"key":"add_student","label":"Add your first student","done":true},{"key":"enroll_face","label":"Enroll a student face","done":true},{"key":"visit_scan","label":"Open the face scanner","done":false},{"key":"first_attendance","label":"Mark first attendance","done":true},{"key":"visit_report","label":"View attendance report","done":false}],"completed":3,"total":5} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_10_student_created_is_force_pw_gated
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sec001_seed_flow.py:254: in test_10_student_created_is_force_pw_gated assert cp.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

Please change your password before continuing."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
